faq.question: What are the camp dates and hours?
faq.answer: Camp runs Monday-Friday, August 3-7, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

faq.question: What will the kids do?
faq.answer: The week includes kosher cooking, baking, fun trips, water play, and Jewish values woven throughout.

faq.question: How do I register?
faq.answer: The online form is coming soon. For now, contact Rabbi Sholom at (302) 377-1162 or Rabbi@JewishSouthernDelaware.com.
